title: FNMC
description: Adds fortnite type off gameplay to your server
body:
# FNMC - Fortnite Mechanics in Minecraft

FNMC is a comprehensive Minecraft plugin that brings the core mechanics of Fortnite into your Minecraft server. Built for Paper 1.21+, this plugin transforms your server into a battle royale experience with authentic building mechanics, combat systems, and HUD elements.

Carefully crafted for PvP enthusiasts, creative builders, and competitive players, FNMC delivers a complete Fortnite experience with precise building controls, realistic combat mechanics, and immersive gameplay features.

It's lightweight, server-side, and designed to feel like a natural extension of Minecraft.

## Features

### 🏗️ **Advanced Building System**
- **4 Build Types**: Floor, Wall, Cone, and Stairs with authentic Fortnite mechanics
- **Real-Time Preview**: White glass preview blocks show exactly where your builds will be placed
- **Smart Placement**: Intelligent block placement system that adapts to terrain
- **Player-Facing Stairs**: Stairs automatically orient to face the player for optimal building
- **Customizable Build Order**: Configure your hotbar build order with `/buildorder` command
- **Edit Mode**: Use Shift + Q to edit (destroy) blocks you've built while looking at them

### ⚔️ **Combat & Weapons**
- **Dual Weapon System**:
    - **Assault Rifle** (Iron Hoe): 30-round magazine, automatic fire with realistic cooldown
    - **Shotgun** (Stone Hoe): 8-round magazine, spread-shot mechanics with higher damage
- **Realistic Reloading**: Automatic reload system with authentic sound effects and timing
- **Projectile Physics**: Arrows with gravity, spread, and realistic ballistics
- **Ammo Management**: Visual ammo counter and reload notifications

### 🛡️ **Health & Shield System**
- **Dual Health System**: 100 HP + 100 Shield points (200 total)
- **Shield Priority**: Damage hits shields first, then health
- **Healing Items**:
    - **Medkits** (Golden Apple): Restore full health over 3 seconds
    - **Shield Potions** (Potion): Restore 50 shield points over 2 seconds
- **Power-Up Target**: Shoot the stone brick target for 5 seconds of Resistance II + Regeneration II
- **Fall Damage**: Realistic fall damage calculation (3+ block falls)

### 📊 **HUD & Interface**
- **Boss Bar Health Display**: Real-time health and shield visualization
- **Action Bar Stats**: Live ammo count, healing items, and weapon status
- **Color-Coded Indicators**: Health (red), Shield (blue), Ammo (gold)
- **Sound Effects**: Authentic audio feedback for all actions
- **Visual Effects**: Particle effects for power-ups and special events

### 🏟️ **Arena & Environment**
- **Sky Arena**: Complete arena built at Y=200 to avoid terrain conflicts
- **Protected Structures**: Arena blocks and grass platforms are unbreakable
- **Dynamic Arena Wall**: Opens when 2+ players approach, closes after timer
- **Spawn System**: Automatic teleportation to sky platform on join
- **Void Protection**: Players die if they fall below the platform

### 🎮 **Game Mechanics**
- **No Item Drops**: Players cannot drop items (prevents griefing)
- **Keep Inventory**: Items are retained on death for continuous gameplay
- **Build Limits**: Cannot build on protected blocks or grass platforms
- **Connected Destruction**: Pickaxe (Iron Axe) destroys connected structures
- **Cooldown Systems**: Build, shoot, heal, and edit cooldowns for balanced gameplay

### ⚙️ **Configuration & Commands**
- **Build Order Customization**: `/buildorder <floor|wall|cone|stairs> <slot2> <slot3> <slot4>`
- **Persistent Settings**: Player configurations saved between sessions
- **Hot-Swappable Builds**: Switch between build types using hotbar slots 1-4
- **Auto-Save System**: Configurations automatically saved on player quit

### 🔧 **Technical Features**
- **Paper API Integration**: Uses modern Adventure API for enhanced performance
- **Memory Efficient**: Optimized data structures and cleanup systems
- **Event-Driven**: Responsive event handling for smooth gameplay
- **Multi-Threading**: Async tasks for performance-critical operations
- **Error Handling**: Robust error handling and logging

## Installation

1. **Download** the latest FNMC.jar from releases
2. **Place** the jar file in your server's `plugins` folder
3. **Restart** your server
4. **Join** and start building!

## Controls

- **Slots 1-4**: Select build type (Floor/Wall/Cone/Stairs)
- **Left Click**: Place selected build structure
- **Right Click**: Use healing items (Medkit/Shield Potion)
- **Shift + RMB**: Edit Build Pieces
- **Iron Hoe**: Assault Rifle (Left click to shoot)
- **Stone Hoe**: Shotgun (Left click to shoot)
- **Iron Axe**: Pickaxe (Break connected structures)
- **Target Practice**: Shoot the stone brick for power-ups

## Commands

| Command | Description | Usage |
|---------|-------------|-------|
| `/buildorder` | Customize your build hotbar order | `/buildorder floor wall cone stairs` |

## Requirements

**Required:**
- Paper 1.21+ (or compatible fork)
- Java 17+

**Optional:**
- 2+ players for full arena experience

## Compatibility

- **Server Software**: Paper, Purpur, Pufferfish (Paper forks)
- **Minecraft Version**: 1.21-1-2-3-4-5-6-7-8
- **NOT Compatible**: Spigot, CraftBukkit (requires Paper's Adventure API)

## Who is FNMC for?

- **PvP Servers** looking for unique building-based fornite style combat
- **Mini-Game Networks** wanting fornite gameplay gameplay (the plugin offers only 1 arena so no 2 games at the same time)
- **Creative Builders** who love Fortnite's building mechanics
- **Competitive Players** seeking skill-based building and shooting
- **Server Owners** wanting fresh, engaging content for their community

## Performance

- **Lightweight**: Minimal server impact with optimized code
- **Scalable**: Handles multiple players simultaneously
- **Memory Efficient**: Smart cleanup and garbage collection
- **Lag-Free**: Optimized for smooth 20 TPS operation

## Support & Community

- **Documentation**: Comprehensive feature documentation included
- **Updates**: Regular updates for new Minecraft versions
- **Community**: Growing community of server owners and players

## Credits

**Plugin Developer**: [Frqme]  
**Inspired by**: Epic Games' Fortnite building mechanics  
**Built with**: Paper API, Adventure API

*Transform your Minecraft server into the ultimate fornite focused building and combat experience with FNMC!*
